project.name: 桐邻 First 120 Minutes · 三方向视觉探索
project.designRead: mobile H5 community integration route / new expat + local residents / warm editorial vs passport vs navigator / medium density / avoid purple AI tech gradient
project.styleDefinitionBrief: Three dramatic directions for a Chengdu Tongzilin community integration H5: editorial handbook (warm paper, serif), passport voucher (ticket stamps, mono), city navigator (map-first, dense). All share deep teal #0f766e brand DNA, bilingual CN/EN.

styleContinuityAnchors.colorSystem: primary #0f766e deep teal across all directions; each direction has distinct neutral palette: A warm cream, B parchment, C cool gray-green
styleContinuityAnchors.shapeSystem: A: 4/8/12px rounded editorial; B: 2/6px sharp ticket edges; C: 4/8px clean practical
styleContinuityAnchors.typographySystem: A: Noto Serif SC display + Noto Sans SC body; B: Noto Sans SC + JetBrains Mono for ticket IDs; C: Inter + Noto Sans SC, condensed feel
styleContinuityAnchors.spacingSystem: A: generous 20-24px gaps; B: structured 12-16px ticket grid; C: compact 8-12px information density
styleContinuityAnchors.componentLanguage: A: magazine columns + route notes; B: ticket cards with perforations + stamp badges; C: map overlay cards + timeline rail
styleContinuityAnchors.surfaceAndDepth: A: paper texture + subtle shadow ≤0.04; B: flat ticket surfaces + border-led; C: clean white cards on map bg + shadow ≤0.04
styleContinuityAnchors.imageryAndIconography: real community photography only; no emoji icons; custom SVG line icons for all directions
styleContinuityAnchors.interactionTone: all directions: bilingual labels, 44px+ touch targets, 10s value comprehension, 30s to route

sharedProjectShellContract.radiusScale: A: 4/8/12px; B: 2/6px; C: 4/8px — each direction independent
sharedProjectShellContract.surfaceDepthModel: static cards border-led; floating layers shadow ≤0.08
sharedProjectShellContract.ctaStyle: primary button bg var(--brand-primary), white text, min-height 44px
sharedProjectShellContract.primaryColorSystem: #0f766e deep teal shared across all directions

pages.title: A · 首屏 — 成都社区探索手册
pages.visualNorthStar: A warm editorial magazine cover that feels like a curated local guidebook — the user sees a beautiful community photo with route-note annotations, immediately understanding they will get a personal 2-hour integration route
pages.compositionPattern: asymmetric editorial hero with handwritten route annotations

pages.title: A · 路线页 — 成都社区探索手册
pages.visualNorthStar: An editorial route journal page — a hand-drawn-feel timeline with place photos, cultural tips, and route notes, like reading a beautifully designed travel guidebook spread
pages.compositionPattern: vertical timeline with magazine-style place cards

pages.title: B · 首屏 — 国际邻里通行证
pages.visualNorthStar: A neighborhood passport entry page — the user sees a travel-document-style card with stamp slots and ticket stubs, immediately understanding they will collect community experiences like passport stamps
pages.compositionPattern: passport-spread hero with ticket-stub preference selectors

pages.title: B · 路线页 — 国际邻里通行证
pages.visualNorthStar: A stamped itinerary voucher — the route is presented as a series of ticket-style stops with perforated edges, stamp badges for completed actions, and a final completion stamp

pages.title: C · 首屏 — 城市生活导航仪
pages.visualNorthStar: A map-first landing — the user sees an aerial neighborhood map with a route preview overlay, compact preference chips, and a prominent generate-route button, like opening a practical city navigation app
pages.compositionPattern: map-dominant full-bleed with overlay cards and bottom sheet

pages.title: C · 路线页 — 城市生活导航仪
pages.visualNorthStar: A real-time navigation interface — full-screen map with route polyline, compact stop cards in a bottom sheet, live status indicators, and a completion banner
pages.compositionPattern: full-screen map with bottom-sheet timeline and overlay status
